title: Soul Weeknights: Quick & Cozy
description: A Soul-Food-forward weeknight pack: fast mains, bright sides, and optional craft workflows (ferments, wine musts, non-pork bacon/sausage) to level up future meals.

meta.curation_notes: Favor 30-minute builds, sheet-pan/one-pot patterns, and big flavor with minimal cleanup. Pair with rice, grits, or greens.

items.title: Caribbean Sheet-Pan Chicken with Pineapple & Peppers
items.description: Sweet-heat glaze, roasted peppers and onion. Serve with coconut rice or greens.
ingredients: 1 cup pineapple chunks (fresh or canned, drained)
2 tbsp jerk seasoning or Caribbean spice blend
steps: Heat oven to 425°F / 220°C.
Toss chicken, pineapple, pepper, and onion with oil, jerk seasoning, salt, and lime juice.
Roast 20–25 min until chicken is done and edges caramelize. Rest 5 min.

items.title: Quick West African Peanut Stew (Weeknight)
items.description: Creamy, cozy peanut-tomato base with greens; weeknight-speed shortcut.
steps: Sauté onion and garlic in oil 2–3 min.
Stir in tomato paste; cook 1 min.
Whisk in peanut butter and broth; simmer 8–10 min.
Add greens (and protein if using) and simmer 3–5 min; season.

items.title: Cajun Shrimp & Weeknight Grits
items.description: Spiced shrimp over creamy quick-grits; weeknight friendly.
steps: Cook grits per package with water/broth; finish with butter, salt, pepper.
Toss shrimp with Cajun seasoning; sear in oil 2–3 min until just done.
Serve shrimp over grits; add green onions or lemon if desired.

items.title: Creole Red Beans & Rice (Quick Skillet)
items.description: Shortcut skillet with canned beans; smoky spices (no pork).
steps: Sauté onion, celery, pepper in oil 4–5 min; add garlic 30 sec.
Add paprika, Creole seasoning; toast 30 sec.
Stir in beans and liquid; simmer 8–10 min to thicken; season.
Serve over hot rice with hot sauce.

items.title: BBQ Sheet-Pan Turkey Meatballs with Slaw
items.description: Oven meatballs tossed in BBQ glaze; crunchy slaw to finish.
steps: Heat oven to 425°F / 220°C. Mix turkey, crumbs, egg, garlic/onion powder, salt, pepper.
Scoop onto sheet; bake 12–15 min.
Toss hot meatballs with BBQ sauce; dress slaw and serve.

items.title: Citrus-Chili Salmon & Veg Tray-Bake
items.description: Bright, zesty; sheet-pan veggies roast alongside.
ingredients: Zest + juice of 1 lime or orange
steps: Heat oven to 425°F / 220°C; toss veg with oil, salt; start 8 min.
Push veg aside; add salmon. Mix zest/juice with chili flakes; brush on salmon.
Bake 10–12 min until salmon flakes.

items.title: Herb-Garlic Skillet Chicken with Greens
items.description: Seared chicken, quick pan sauce, handful of greens to finish.
steps: Season chicken with herbs, salt, pepper; sear in oil 2–3 min/side.
Add garlic; deglaze with broth; simmer 2–3 min.
Fold in greens to wilt; serve.

items.title: Quick Turkey “Bacon” Bits (No Pork)
items.description: Smoky turkey bits for salads, beans, and grits.
ingredients: 8 oz turkey slices or ground turkey
1 tsp soy sauce or coconut aminos
steps: Dice or crumble turkey; cook in oil until crisp.
Season with smoked paprika, garlic, and soy/aminos; cook 1–2 min to coat.

items.title: Simple Beef Breakfast Sausage (No Pork)
steps: Mix seasonings into meat; form small patties.
Pan-sear 2–3 min/side; cool and freeze, or serve.

items.title: Pepper Mash Ferment (Starter Jar)
items.description: Begin a small jar of chili mash to power future sauces.
steps: Mash chilies with salt; pack into clean jar.
Loosely cover; burp daily; ferment 5–7 days to taste.

items.title: Backyard Wine Must (Small-Batch)
items.description: A tiny must for cooking/wine vinegar pathways later.
steps: Combine in sanitized jar; fit airlock or loose lid.
Ferment cool & dark 3–7 days until active; use for sauces or continue to wine.
